# PyFR helper instructions

- PyFR branches live at `/scratch/.github/sambitmishra98/PyFR/<branch-name>`.
- One venv per branch/version lives at
  `/scratch/.venvs/sambitmishra98/PyFR/<branch-name>`.
- Keep environment setup, source edits, run configuration, test execution, and
  numerical verification separated.
- State which layer is being changed and keep patches scoped.
